title: The Rise Of Kirby
description: Get an alliance with the powerfull kirby and catch all minecraft mobs by gaining their powers and abillities.
body:
In this mod you will be able to get a kirby which is used to absorb mobs abillities, there exist 56 kirby transformation and all mobs can be absorbed, there is a book where you can find information about some transformations the mod have.
